reason: AE gen 6 experiment: RL2F shows 11 partial matches vs 3 misses (insights endpoint). Partials indicate reflection identifies issues but doesn't explicitly track unresolved ones across cycles. Adding structured carry-forward with cycle age forces explicit handoff of partially-addressed items, reducing information loss between cycles.
